content: Reflexion’s dynamic long-term memory architecture can be integrated into Self-Refine’s iterative feedback loop to fix a key flaw of vanilla Self-Refine: it forgets lessons learned from failed refinement iterations on earlier tasks when moving to new prompts or refinement cycles. This hybrid agent would retain generalized, abstracted insights from past refinement attempts to avoid repeating mistakes and speed up convergence on high-quality outputs for new tasks.
